facebook.copy: Myth: 80C tax planning is complicated. Fact: Estimating your deductions can be simple and straightforward! Unlock potential tax savings under Section 80C with RupeeKit's easy-to-use calculator. Understand how contributions to EPF, PPF, ELSS, home loan principal, and even children's tuition fees can help reduce your taxable income, up to the ₹1,50,000 limit. Our tool guides you step-by-step to input your details and provides an educational estimate of your eligible deductions. Don't leave your tax planning to chance. Compare your inputs and plan smarter. Get started today: https://www.rupeekit.co.in/tools/80c-deduction-calculator-india
